texto: It wouldn't have to be sunny It wouldn't have to be anything else then just that It would really simplify my walk home at night, where every thought I think is some contrived line I repeat over and over to myself Words are always just replaced with new ones The pictures would never need to know otherwise
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jackie Clark sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “It wouldn't have to be sunny It wouldn't have to be anything else then just that It would really …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, poem, wouldn, útil em momentos de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
